title: Inferno (disambiguation)
content:
'''Inferno''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
===In-universe===
*'''[[Inferno Squad]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[special forces]] [[commando]] unit
**[[Callsign]]s: '''[[Inferno-One]]''', '''[[Inferno-Two]]''', '''[[Inferno-Three]]''', and '''[[Inferno-Four]]'''
*'''[[Inferno Squad (Resistance)|Inferno Squad]]''', a [[New Republic]] [[New Republic Defense Force|military]] unit

===Out-of-universe===
*'''''[[Battlefront II: Inferno Squad]]'''''
*'''[[Battlefront II: Inferno Squad (audiobook)|''Battlefront II: Inferno Squad'' audiobook]]'''

==Legends==
===In-universe===
*'''[[Inferno (Vilmarh Grahrk)|''Inferno'']]''', a personal [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by [[Vilmarh Grahrk]]
*'''[[Inferno (Imperial I-class)|''Inferno'']]''', an [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]]
*'''[[Inferno (volcano)|Inferno]]''', a [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]] on [[Baroonda/Legends|Baroonda]]
*'''[[Inferno (track)|Inferno]]''', a [[Podracing/Legends|Podracing]] track that traveled through the aforementioned volcano
*'''[[Inferno firefighting robo]]''', a [[Firefighter droid/Legends|firefighter droid]]
*'''[[Inferno Turret]]''', a powerful turret that protected [[Nym's Base]]

===Out-of-universe===
*'''''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno]]'''''
*'''[[Legacy of the Force: Inferno (audiobook)|''Legacy of the Force: Inferno'' audiobook]]'''

{{Disambig}}

|pl=Inferno (strona ujednoznaczniająca)
}}
